patterns.strategic_implication: Focus product deployment on these equipment types.

patterns.description: Top pain: Equipment Damage (16x across interviews)
patterns.strategic_implication: Lead with this pain point in customer conversations.
Need more cost data points to narrow range.

gaps.description: No interviews from [L3, OB]: Executive at partner/supplier

next_best_interview.recommendation: No interviews from [L3, OB]: Executive at partner/supplier

insights.title: VALIDATED: Manual Detection is Industry-Wide Failure
insights.description: Confidence: 95% (was 50%). Based on 11 supporting evidence from 8 interviews.
insights.recommendation: Position product as replacement for failed manual detection. Use validated failure rate in pitch.

insights.title: VALIDATED: True Cost Impact is Understated
insights.description: Confidence: 90% (was 50%). Based on 7 supporting evidence from 6 interviews.
insights.recommendation: Use validated cost figures in ROI modeling. Lead with 'true cost discovery' in customer conversations.

insights.title: VALIDATED: Capital Investment Alone Doesn't Solve Contamination
insights.description: Confidence: 98% (was 50%). Based on 14 supporting evidence from 10 interviews.
insights.recommendation: Target mills with recent capital investments. Message: 'You invested in equipment but the contamination problem persists.'

insights.title: VALIDATED: Operators Sense Problems Instruments Miss
insights.description: Confidence: 98% (was 50%). Based on 11 supporting evidence from 11 interviews.
insights.recommendation: Design interface for operator input. Emphasize 'operators know first' in value proposition.

insights.title: VALIDATED: Blow Line Entry Point is Critical Blind Spot
insights.description: Confidence: 74% (was 50%). Based on 2 supporting evidence from 2 interviews.
insights.recommendation: Focus product positioning on blow line entry point. 'Last chance detection before the digester.'

insights.title: Strong Cross-Validation (53 validation links)
insights.description: Multiple independent interviews corroborate each other's claims.
insights.recommendation: Evidence base is strengthening. Continue to diversify sources.

market_opportunity.caveat: Market sizing is rough. Based on interview cost extracts only. Refine with additional interviews and published industry data.
